en.tutorial_forestry_text_grabtrunk: Use the arm to grab a log of wood and put it in the trailer.  Once you’ve finished, drive over to the wood selling point marked on your map.
en.ui_infotraindrive: The train will now drive to Felsbrunn and will return on the other side of the map.
en.ui_presskeytomap: Press the key you want to use as '%s'.
en.helptext_34_part02: Silage can be created by fermenting chaff in a clamp silo. It can also be produced by wrapping round grass bales with a bale wrapper.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_tosellpoint: Good! Now fasten the tension belts and transport this log to the sawmill.  Tension belts secure your cargo and stop it moving around during transport.
en.hint_04: If a vehicle or tool gets stuck, you can reset it in the shop parking lot on the map overview screen.
en.ui_masterserverconnectionlost: Connection to the server lost. Check your internet connection and restart the game.
en.function_storage: Warehouse for storing your produce. Here you can unload trailers or store pallets.
en.helptext_35_part01: Total Mixed Ration is produced by mixing together hay, straw and silage, with at least 25% of each and no more than 75% of each.
en.tooltip_dirt: The speed at which your machinery becomes dirty.
en.tour_text_part03_startsowing: The sowing machine you just attached is already filled with seeds. Once you run out, you will have to refill it with a seed bag. You start with 2 bags at your farm. Once they've been used up, you'll need to buy more from the shop.  Time to sow! Select the seed you want to use, turn on and lower the sowing machine, then drive over the field.
en.helptext_02_part01: In Farming Simulator 19 there are 13 types of crops: wheat, barley, canola, sunflowers, soybeans, corn, oat, oilseed radish, potatoes, sugar beet, poplars, sugarcane and cotton.
en.function_sprayertank: Additional tanks increase the capacity of sprayers.
en.tooltip_showtriggermarker: Show yellow and black markers around interactive zones.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_logintruck: Light pieces of wood can be moved by hand. Once you have picked it up, you can rotate it.  Grab a log and put it in your truck.
en.tour_text_part01_startharvesting: Now you're all set to harvest! Drive forward into the wheat. You can either adjust your vehicle's speed manually or use the cruise control to maintain a constant speed.  The maximum speed you can drive is automatically determined by the vehicle and attached tool you are using.

en.helptext_66_part01: Farming Simulator can be changed to your likings with community-created modifications (mods). They can alter your way of playing greatly, make things easier or even more complex and realistic. They can add new machines and tools, placeable objects or even completely new maps to play on. To browse through the mods, visit the mod section in the game's main menu.

en.warning_onlyoneofthisitemallowedperfarm: Only one item allowed per farm!
en.helptext_19_01_part01: Food: hay and oat  Horses are trained and then sold for a profit. You can own up to 16 horses, each with its own name and fitness level. The higher the fitness level, the higher the value. Raise their fitness level by riding them.  When you buy a horse it is given a name automatically. You can change its name in the animal menu.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_unfoldstabilizers: To stop the forwarder tipping over when we lift a heavy piece of wood, unfold the stabilizers first.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_unfoldandlow: First, fill the sowing machine with the seed pallet next to it. Then turn it on so it can plant seeds. Finally, lower it into the soil.  Once all this is done, drive up the field again and sow some canola seeds!
en.shop_messagenospace: Delivery space blocked! Please move other items out of the way.
en.helptext_36_01_part01: Lime can be bought in pallets at the shop.
en.dialog_keepdisplayproperties: You have changed your display properties. Do you want to keep these settings?
en.ui_outdatedgameversion: Your game version is out of date. Please install updates.
en.helptext_02_part02: To process field crops, there are 3 mandatory steps: cultivating, sowing and harvesting.
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_finishedlime: Great!  For some crops, you should also plow after the harvest. Let's take a look.
en.ui_landscaping_objectobstructed: An object is obstructing the terrain modification
en.helptext_36_part01: Manure is produced by cows and pigs as long as the cows are provided with straw bedding.
en.helptext_07_part02: After that, you can get the crop out of the ground by using a harvester, like the Grimme SE 260.
en.tutorial_baling_text_attachtools02: Get in your tractor and attach the weight and bale collector. Then lower the loading platform and drive it into a bale to pick it up.
en.dialog_networkisdisabled: The network is disabled in settings
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_attachcultiv: You need to attach the weight and the cultivator.  First, slowly drive to the small black weight in front of you and attach it to your tractor.  Then, move backwards toward the cultivator and attach it to the back of your tractor.  The extra weight will counter balance the heavy weight at the back.
en.tutorial_animals_openanimaldealer: To interact with the animal dealer, park the trailer in the area marked on the ground.  Then open the animal dealer menu. This is where you can buy or sell your animals.  Buy as many pigs as you can fit in your trailer.
en.shop_doyouwanttolease: Do you want to lease it for %s?
en.shop_messagenotenoughmoneytolease: You do not have enough money!
en.ui_sellorcustomizevehicletext: Here you can customize or repair your vehicles.
en.shop_messagenopermissiontotradeanimals: You currently do not have permission to trade animals.
en.tour_text_part02_startcultivating: Now lower the cultivator and drive over the field to cultivate its soil.
en.helptext_13_part01: When you harvest wheat, barley or oat you can set your harvester to create straw swaths.
en.ui_removefromfarmconfirm: Do you really want to remove %s from your farm?
en.animals_descriptionchicken: Chickens require a clean feeding area.
en.function_dolly: A dolly serves as a link between a semitrailer and a tractor.
en.info_movepipeovertrailer: Move the pipe over a trailer
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_entertractor: Right then! Tractor. Plow. Weight. Let's go!
en.tutorial_forestry_text_chainsawcuttree: Move close to the tree highlighted with a blue marker.  Position the chainsaw to the side of the tree. When a green circular highlight appears, activate the chainsaw and wait until it has gone through the entire width of the trunk.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_welcome2: TMR is produced by mixing together hay, straw and silage in a mixer-wagon.  You should already know how to make hay and straw bales. Let's learn about silage.
en.helptext_35_part03: Digestate can be produced by delivering silage to the biogas plant.
en.function_windrower: A windrower arranges grass, hay or straw in rows (windrows), which can then be scooped up by forage wagons or balers.
en.function_biobalerfronttool: With this tool poplar can be pushed down to be taken by the BioBaler.
en.warning_theselectedfruittypeiswrongforth: This is the wrong fruit type for the contract!
en.tutorial_forestry_text_chainsaw: There are two tools for cutting down trees: - Chainsaw - Tree harvester  Let's start with the chainsaw.
en.warning_actionnotallowedhere: This action cannot be performed here!
en.function_balestacker: A bale collector eases the collection of bales.
en.function_weight: A weight helps keeping a tractor's wheels on the ground and improves its balance.
en.fieldjob_endcontract: Are you sure you want to cancel this contract and lose all payment?
en.helptext_53_part02: 2) Maximum speed: Shows the maximum speed of the vehicle or in case of tools, the maximum speed it can be operated with.
en.hint_17: On the finance screen, you can see all the income and expenditure for the current day and previous four days. If you need more money urgently, you can borrow some from the bank in increments of $CURRENCY_SYMBOL5000.
en.helptext_28_part02: You can harvest poplars with the help of a forage harvester and a special header in conjunction with a trailer to obtain a plethora of woodchips.
en.shop_messagefailedtoreturnvehicle: Returning failed! Please try again later.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_entertractor: Great! Get out of the combine and get into the tractor in front of the tipper.
en.function_tedder: A tedder turns grass around so it can dry faster.
en.helptext_55_part02: You can hire multiple helpers at the same time, but make sure to keep an eye on their costs!
en.animals_invalidanimaltype: This type of animal cannot be unloaded here!
en.hint_28: Straw swaths can be packed into bales using a baler. Alternatively, straw can be collected in loading wagons. It can be used as bedding for animals or to make Total Mixed Ration (TMR).
en.helptext_47_part03: The following items can be customized: vehicle color and design, engine and wheel setup and the option to have a front loader attacher installed or not. Note that not every vehicle or tool allows for every customization.
en.info_siloextensionnotempty: The silo is not empty. The following grain types will be sold too:
en.tour_text_part04_sellwheat: Move the tractor so the trailer is located right over the pit. As soon as the unload symbol appears at the bottom of the screen, you can unload the wheat and sell it.
en.helptext_55_part01: A hired worker is displayed with a small hexagon and a letter on the mini map. Once your helper finishes processing the field, they will stop automatically. Hiring a helper will cost you money as long as the helper is active.
en.helptext_23_part01: Adding straw bedding to a cow or pig enclosure creates manure for the farm.
en.hint_27: When you harvest wheat, barley or oat, you can create straw swaths with the harvester.
en.ui_savingcontent_xboxone: Saving content. Please do not turn off your console.
en.ui_tutorialisnotsaved: Are you sure you want to restart this tutorial?
en.achievement_descplaytime10: Reach 10 hours of playing time in a single savegame
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_attachtools02: Try it! Go to your tractor.  Attach the weight and cultivator and cultivate the field as you do usually.
en.function_forestrytransport: This vehicle can transport tree logs.
en.warning_numsplitshapesmaxed: Cutting not possible at the moment. Please sell some wood logs first.
en.ingamenotification_palletspawnerblocked: No more space to place new pallets (%s) at: %s!
en.function_telehandler: Telehandlers are used to stack and load various goods.
en.function_biobaler: Bio balers are used to press poplar into bales.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_startplanting: Make sure to fill the tool. Then lower it and turn on your tree planter. Drive across the field to plant trees.
en.fieldjob_wrongcrop: You are planting the wrong crop for the contract
en.tooltip_plowingrequired: Whether or not you need to plow your fields periodically to keep yield high.
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasonblocke: Helper %s is blocked by an object!
en.tooltip_colorblindmode: Switches colors of crops and field states on the map view to easier to recognize hues for red/green color blindness.
en.ui_ingamesleeprequest: Player '%s' wants to sleep. Accept request?
en.shop_messagenotenoughmoneytobuyfarmland: You don't have enough money to buy this land!
en.function_loadingvehiclevariousgoods: This machine collects materials from the ground and tips them into trailers.
en.helptext_32_part02: Grass can be cut with a mower. It can be gathered with a loading wagon.
en.ui_missionvehiclesatshop: The leased machines are waiting for you at the shop. Remember to fill the tools if needed.
en.hint_08: If your front loader is carrying something heavy, you can attach a weight to the back of the tractor to balance it out.
en.animals_inuse: Could not move animal because it is in use!
en.warning_insufficientpoweroutput: Insufficient power available for the attached equipment.
en.tooltip_economicdifficulty: The economic difficulty affects the buying and selling prices. Also the revenue of contracts is based on this factor.
en.tour_text_part03_entertractor01: Fields that have been cultivated are ready to be sown. For this you need to use a sowing machine. Get back in the tractor and attach the sowing machine that's placed behind it.
en.animals_transporttargetlefttrigger: The transportation vehicle is no longer available!
en.tutorial_baling_text_startworkbaler: Alright, ready for operation! Now drive over the windrow to collect the straw.
en.ui_modsziponly: Only zipped mods are supported in multiplayer. You need to zip the mod '%s' to use it in multiplayer.
en.function_chainsaw: Using a chainsaw you can cut down trees.
en.helptext_52_part04: 3) Required power: Shows the required engine power to operate the tool properly.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_finishedwee: Good! Now, your crops have more room to grow and they won't have to compete with weeds for nutrients.
en.function_beehive: Produces honey which is sold automatically to earn you money.
en.function_feederbale: This machine takes straw bales and uses them to cover the ground of a cow stable with straw.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_planter: To plant trees, you need a tree planter.  Get in the tractor and attach the tree planter and the weight.
en.helptext_53_part07: 7) Age: Shows how many days you've owned the vehicle/tool.
en.ui_banconfirm: Do you really want to ban %s? They will be unable to join this server until you lift the ban again.
en.ui_authenticationfailed_xboxone: Could not authenticate user with Xbox Live server.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_turnonmixer: Good job! All the ingredients are now in the mixer wagon.  Enter and activate it to mix the food.
en.ui_connectionlostkicked: The host has removed you from the server.
en.helpicon_text12: As soon as you purchase some sheep, they'll start producing wool. Over time, a pallet with several sacks of wool will appear here. You can pick it up with a front loader and transport it to the spinnery where you can sell it.
en.tooltip_automaticmotorstart: Whether or not the vehicles' engines are started/stopped automatically upon entering/exiting a vehicle.
en.helptext_24_part01: Food: grass and hay Product: wool Reproduction speed: fast
en.helptext_04_part01: You can sow using a seeder or a planter.  To sow, you must: - Fill the machine with seeds from a seed pallet - Select the crop you want to sow - Turn on the machine - Lower it into the ground
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_tmrfinished: Great work!  TMR is the best food for your cows.  If you don't have any cows, you can sell silage for a good price at the biogas plant.
en.helptext_09_part02: And to avoid a 35% yield malus, you must: - Remove bad weeds (otherwise -20%) - Plow after corn, potatoes, sugar beets and sugarcane (otherwise -15%)
en.tour_text_part01_finished: The helper will now take care of this job until they are done or the grain tank of the harvester is full. You can now take care of other business. Exit the harvester and walk to the next question mark symbol indicated on the map.
en.helptext_44_part01: The fields on the map are owned by other farmers controlled by the computer.  They take care of their fields but are always in need of assistance. To start a job for them, go to the Contracts menu. They can lend you any tools you need, but you can also use your own. You can cooperate with other players in multiplayer mode to complete these jobs.
en.ui_notallmodsavailable_xboxone: You do not have all the required DLC.
en.info_baleloaderloweringtable: Table is being lowered. Please wait...
en.helptext_04_part02: Seed pallets can be purchased at the shop. Some seeders can cultivate and sow in one go. Check the shop description to find a machine that can do this.
en.helptext_sa_05: During harvest, specialized sugarcane tippers are commonly used as they have a higher tip height, allowing them to tip the sugarcane stalks directly into a truck to guarantee a quick transport. Sugarcane can't be stored in silos, however, it can be tipped anywhere on the ground and stored there. Different stations offer different prices for sugarcane, but the most profitable station would be the sugarcane mill.
en.function_weeder: Weeders pull out small grown weeds between crops, improving the field's state. They can only be used in the first growing stages of crops.
en.helptext_40_part01: To sell your products, you need to load your products - normally onto a tipper or trailer - and drive to one of the selling points marked on the map. Open the prices window to identify which station accepts what products and at what price. Ideally, you would want to sell your products at the highest paying station.
en.tour_text_part04_aligntoharvester: Drive next to the harvester on its left-hand side until your trailer is alongside it. The pipe will start extending and if you are in the correct position, the wheat will start pouring out automatically.
en.helptext_52_part05: 4) Fuel tank: Shows the maximum capacity of the fuel tank.
en.warning_firstunfoldthetool: You first need to unfold the tool (%s)!
en.helptext_06_part02: The easiest and fastest way of harvesting potatoes or sugar beets is to use a self-propelled harvester. However, a machine like this is quite costly and likely to exceed your budget early on.
en.helptext_37_part01: Logs are produced by cutting down trees and by cutting the branches with a chainsaw or a dedicated tool.
en.helptext_41_part01: The prices of all sellable commodities change constantly and act in accordance with supply and demand. You can influence the prices by deciding what you want to deliver and how much of it.  If, for example, you sell only wheat in several deliveries, its demand will go down considerably and its price will fall accordingly. This also means that prices for commodities you hardly ever sell will go up much faster.
en.warning_nofreemissionspace: No space for contract vehicles. Please move your equipment away.
en.warning_youdonthaveaccesstothisland: You don't have access to this land!
en.ui_savegamehasmissingdlcsoptional_ps4: This savegame uses downloadable content which is not installed. If you continue, some vehicles will not be available. Alternatively, you can download the following content:
en.statistic_animalrequirementshorse: Horses require straw for a clean bedding, water and food (consisting of 50% hay and 50% oat) to stay healthy. They should ride out every day to increase their fitness. Periodically they need to be brushed down and cleaned. A horse's value is determined by its fitness, health and cleanliness.
en.hint_12: Some vehicles allow for additional customization, such as different wheels, a stronger engine, a different color or a front loader attachment.
en.ui_savingcontent: Saving content. Please do not turn off your computer.
en.tooltip_timescale: The speed at which the time passes in game.
en.helptext_62_part11: 10) You can purchase various goods here.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_unloadchaff: Unload the chaff into the bunker silo.  When the silo is at least 10% full, you can pack it down by driving over it repeatedly.
en.ui_savegamehasmissingdlcsoptional: This savegame uses downloadable content which is not installed. If you continue, some vehicles will not be available. Alternatively, you can download the following content:
en.tour_text_part01_lookandwalk: Follow the path to the big yellow harvester at the edge of your field and touch the question mark icon next to it.  In the lower left is your map. The flashing green ring indicates where the question mark is located.
en.tooltip_resetcamera: Remembers the camera position per vehicle once you exit it.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_welcome: After sowing your crop, you’ll see weeds start growing at the same time as the crop. If you leave it this way, the weeds will reduce the yield of your crop.  You can remove weeds using a: 1) Weeder 2) Sprayer.
en.ui_cannotmapmousehere: The mouse button can't be used for this action.
en.tooltip_limerequired: Whether or not you need to spread lime on your fields periodically to keep yield high.
en.helptext_53_part01: 1) Working width: Shows the working width of the vehicle/tool.
en.function_frontloader: Front loaders are used to stack and load various goods.
en.helptext_53_part05: 6) Information: Gives you a general explanation of the vehicle/tool and important information.
en.ui_farmedmergedsp: The farms from this multi-player game have been merged into a single farm. After saving, this game will become a single-player game permanently.
en.warning_placeable_error_cannotbeplacedat: The object cannot be placed here!
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasonfieldn: Helper %s has stopped work unexpectedly - field not owned!
en.dialog_shoponlyworksincareer: The vehicle shop is only accessible during the career.
en.tutorial_animals_cleaningfinished: Good! They’ve got a nice clean feeding area, straw to lie down on and enough water and food to keep them happy and productive!  They reproduce too: From time to time, a new animal will appear.  In the next lesson, you’ll learn how to make up a Total Mixed Ration, the best thing to feed your cows.
en.function_balewrapper: A bale wrapper packs grass bales in foil so they can ferment into silage.
en.tooltip_autohelp: Show the controls information box in the top left section of the screen.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_finishedharvestin: Perfect! Now we will see how to transport and sell the logs.
en.dialog_savegameoverwrite: Do you want to continue and overwrite the savegame?
en.helptext_39_part02: If your pigs are happy, they'll reproduce. You can sell your pigs to the livestock dealer to earn money.
en.function_semitrailer: Semitrailers can be attached to a tractor by using a dolly.
en.helptext_52_part03: 2) Engine power: Shows the power of the engine.
en.ui_loaddefaultsettings: Do you want to load the default settings?
en.function_skidsteer: Skid Steer Loaders are used to stack and load various goods.
en.ui_testingport: The selected port is being tested...
en.helptext_53_part06: There are only 3 icons in the garage that don't appear in the store:
en.tour_text_notourb: You only have enough money to start a small farm.  First, buy some land, buildings and the necessary tools.  Then sell your products and expand your farm!
en.warning_treetypenotsupported: This tree type is not supported.
en.ui_contractorgrantconfirm: Do you really want to give %s access to your farm?
en.helpicon_text11: These silos are for temporary storage of your commodities. Drive over the unloading spot with a full trailer and unload its contents. A symbol is displayed to the right as soon as you are in position to start unloading.  To retrieve a commodity from storage, position a trailer below the pipe on the other side and activate it. The trailer will be loaded until it is full or until the storage is empty.
en.ui_savegamesscannodevice: No storage device was selected. This game mode requires a storage device.
en.ui_savingcontent_switch: Saving content. Please do not turn off your Nintendo Switch.
en.function_animalpencow: A place to keep your cows.
en.function_feeder: A forage mixer wagon blends silage, hay and straw into Total Mixed Ration (TMR) that can be fed to cows.
en.hint_03: When there's rain or hail you can't harvest your crops, you must wait until the weather improves.
en.helptext_31_part02: Wheat, barley, canola, corn, sunflower, soybean and oat: these grains can be harvested when a field is ready.
en.function_car: Driving a car allows you to quickly travel from A to B.
en.helpicon_title4: Getting rid of Straw and Hay
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_putbales: Pierce the bales and put them in the mixer.
en.modhub_installnofreespace: Not enough disk space to install mod. Space needed: %u KB Available space: %u KB Please uninstall some other mods to continue.
en.ui_buttonalreadymapped: Note: This button is used for several actions.
en.helptext_15_part03: You can also directly make silage from a grass bale by using a bale wrapper.
en.function_bigbagseeds: Bigbags are used to refill your sowing machines.
en.message_newdlcsrestarttext: Please reload your current progress from the main menu to use the newly installed downloadable content.
en.function_greenhouse: Produces vegetables which are sold automatically to earn you money.
en.ui_banned: You are banned from this server.
en.tooltip_vehiclearmsensitivity: Adjusts the vehicle arm turning speed.
en.animals_husbandryisfull: The pen capacity is already reached!
en.tutorial_baling_descriptionmain: Learn how to make and transport bales.
en.shop_messagefailedtoloadobject: The object could not be purchased. Please try again.
en.shop_messagenotenoughmoneytobuy: You do not have enough money!
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasongraint: Helper %s has a nearly full grain tank! (80%%)
en.helptext_10_part02: Use a tedder to turn the cut grass around so it can dry properly into hay. Hay looks slightly lighter and less saturated than cut grass.
en.ui_savegameloadfailed: Failed to load the savegame. Please try again or use a different storage device.
en.animals_unload: Do you really want to unload %d animals from the vehicle?
en.function_saplingpallet: This pallet of saplings is used to fill the tree planter.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_transporting: A forwarder is the best tool for transporting logs. It has a crane to grab logs and put them in its trailer.  Let's use it to sell these logs.  First, enter the forwarder.
en.function_harvestingpotatowithoutpreparer: This harvester collects the potatoes from the ground. You do not require a haulm cutter before using this machine.
en.fieldjob_buypalletfirst: Make sure to buy a pallet of %s for this contract
en.ui_notallmodsavailable: You do not have all the required Mods/DLC installed.
en.helptext_06_part01: The cultivation of potatoes and sugar beets requires specialized sowing machines and harvesters.
en.ui_authenticationfailed_ps4: Could not authenticate user with PlayStation™Network server.
en.helptext_52_part07: 6) Owned: Shows how many vehicles/tools of this type you currently own.
en.ui_deletethismod: Do you really want to delete this mod?
en.function_harvestingselfpropelledpotato: This self-propelled harvester collects potatoes in one go.
en.helpicon_text16: Here you may unload and sell your wood chips.
en.shop_messagepurchaseready: You can fetch your purchase at the store.
en.tooltip_fruitdestruction: Whether or not vehicles destroy crops when you drive over them.
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_finishedradish: There ya go! Another way to fertilize the soil organically.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_finishedcult: Nicely done, you've got the hang of cultivation! Ready to plant some seeds?
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasonoutoff: Helper %s has stopped work unexpectedly - tank is empty!
en.ui_missingugcdownloadprivilege: User generated content is blocked in your profile settings.
en.helptext_33_part02: Straw can be created while harvesting wheat or barley with a dedicated harvester.
en.helptext_26_part02: Purchase a pallet of either pine or poplar saplings from the shop and load it onto the Damcon PL 75 tree planter. Pine trees can be planted almost anywhere and will take a while to grow. Plant the poplars on a field and harvest them with a forage harvester and a specialized header once they are fully grown.
en.ui_farmdeleteconfirmation: Do you really want to delete this farm? All vehicles, tools and lands will be sold and the money will be lost.
en.helptext_47_part01_ps4: You can purchase new vehicles and tools from the shop.
en.ui_uninvited: You have been uninvited by the host.
en.hint_32: Bring your vehicle to the shop or to your vehicle workshop for repairs.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_welcome: In this lesson, you’ll learn how to make Total Mixed Ration (TMR).  TMR is the best thing to feed your cows and maximize their milk production.
en.helptext_47_part02: Certain vehicles can be customized when bought. Each of them has different customization possibilities.  To customize them later, bring the vehicle to the marked area in front of the shop, then interact with the shop symbol.
en.hint_33: If your vehicle is dirty, use a pressure washer to clean it.
en.tooltip_helperrefillseed: Whether or not the helper automatically refills all seed he sows. Will increase helper cost.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_silagewelcome: Silage is made by fermenting chaff in a bunker silo.  Chaff is leftover material chopped up by a forage harvester.  You can obtain chaff from corn, wheat, barley or canola.
en.helptext_07_part01: A cheaper alternative is to use a tractor with several specialized tools. This basically works in two steps: once the plants are fully grown, you have to cut the foliage with a haulm topper, like the Grimme KS 75-4.
en.helptext_09_part01: There are many ways you can take care of your field to increase its yield.  To obtain a 65% yield bonus you must: - Spread fertilizer twice (+ 25% each time) - Spread lime every 3 harvests (+15%)
en.tour_text_abort: If you'd like to start the guided tour later, start a new career in Ravenport and you’ll be asked again.
en.function_herbicidetank: Herbicides can be used in sprayers to remove weeds.
en.helptext_69_part01: When transporting large objects like tree trunks or bales it is important to secure your cargo. Some trailers allow you to fasten tension belts in order to transport the objects safely.
en.function_unitrac: The Lindner Unitrac is a carrier vehicle. Special attachments allow you to do different tasks.
en.tour_text_part01_attachheader: OK! Attach the harvester's header that's sitting right in front of it.  The help panel in the top left corner always shows you the functions that are currently available.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_attachtools: Get in the tractor and attach the weight and the weeder.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_finishedplanting: Well done! We’ll wait a bit until the trees have grown.
en.function_palletpacker: Loading this machine with potatoes or sugar beets will create nicely packed pallets you can sell. Alternatively it can load conveyor belts with sugar beets or potatoes.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_vehiclecontr: Here's the gas pedal, next to it the brake, and you've seen a steering wheel before, haven't ya? It's easy!
en.function_watertower: The water station can supply your water tanks with fresh water.
en.function_treesaw: With a tree saw you can cut down trees.
en.helptext_11_part01: To make grass, hay or straw collecting easier, it is recommended to arrange it into rows by using a windrower.
en.helpicon_text17: If you want to sell wood, you can simply drop it into the mill pond.  Straight and long pieces get you more money than short and bent ones.
en.hint_14: You can fertilize a field with manure, slurry or manufactured fertilizer (liquid or solid).
en.ui_dlcscorruptredownload: Some downloaded content is corrupt. It is not usable and thus the game must be quit. Please download it again.
en.ui_savegamesscanfailed_ggp: Failed to load available savegames. Please try again later.
en.info_balestackerloweringtable: Frame is being lifted. Please wait...
en.helptext_69_part02: Once you have loaded your cargo you can fasten all tensions belts directly from your vehicles controls. Alternatively you can fasten each belt manually by standing to the side of the trailer next to your cargo. A light green outline will show you where the tension belt can be fastened.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_welcomethres: After some time has passed, a field is ready to be harvested. In Career, look in the map menu to see if any fields are ready to be harvested.  You need a combine-harvester and header for this task. The combine-harvester harvests the grain and separates it from the stems. Then, the grain can be sold.
en.function_harvestingsugarbeet: This harvester digs the sugar beets out of the ground. Note that a haulm topper is needed prior to using this machine.
en.helptext_60_part01: To check the state of your fields, use the map overview. Here you can see: - Crop types in each field - Growth status - Soil composition   You can change the view mode for each field too.
en.helpicon_text14: If you are carrying chicken eggs, you can sell them here by simply walking into the symbol.
en.function_cuttertrailer: Header trailers can transport headers safely on the road.
en.helptext_57_part01: On the finance screen, you can see all income and expenditures for the current day and the previous 4 days. The loan you have taken from the bank is also displayed.  If you need more money urgently, you can borrow some from the bank in loans of $CURRENCY_SYMBOL5000. However, at the end of each day, you will have to pay excessive interest on the loans you have taken out.
en.helptext_36_part02: Slurry is produced by cows and pigs as long as the cows are fed.
en.tooltip_plantgrowthrate: The time it takes for crops to grow.
en.tour_text_part04_unloadwheat: Great! Wheat is being dumped into your trailer. Wait until it is done and then drive your tractor with the trailer to the spot indicated on the map and touch the question mark there.
en.helptext_47_part01: You can purchase new vehicles and tools from the shop. Visit the shop directly via the map or press the designated key (standard P) to open the shop window at any time. Equipment is divided into categories or brands. Change the view using the top arrow buttons.
en.input_shoplist_end: Jump to end of shop list
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_entercombine: Enter the combine-harvester and attach the header at the front.
en.tutorial_baling_text_finishedbaling: Nice job! If you don't have any animals, you can sell bales to earn cash.
en.function_reversedrivecontrol: This vehicle is equipped with reverse drive control.
en.helptext_61_part02: 1) Vehicles such as tractors, trucks or cars
en.tour_text_part02_entertractor01: Fields that have been harvested need to be cultivated before they can be sown anew. This field has been harvested recently and now needs somebody to cultivate it. Enter the tractor and attach the cultivator that's placed behind it.
en.ui_youwanttosellvehicle: Do you really want to sell this vehicle?
en.function_farmsilo: Silos are used to store crops
en.helpicon_text19: Sugarcane grows comparably slow, but it does not wither. Harvested sugarcane will grow back after a while and can be harvested again.
en.helpicon_text2: This is your one-stop destination for acquiring new machinery and for selling your old machines. Newly bought equipment always appears on the space next to this building.
en.helptext_sa_06: As sugarcane regrows, tillage is nearly unnecessary. If you play with 'periodic plowing required', the ground must be aerated after 3 harvests to secure a full yield. The best results are achieved with a subsoiler like the KUHN DC 401, but a plow will be sufficient as well. After loosening the ground, you can plant new stalks of sugarcane.
en.warning_placeable_error_spawnplace: Objects cannot be placed in load areas!
en.helptext_sa_01: Sugarcane differs from typical field and root crops. It needs more time to mature but it also cannot wither. You need special sowing and harvesting equipment for sugarcane.
en.ui_questiontrainsellgoods: Do you want the train sell the loaded goods at the Grain Mill in Felsbrunn?
en.warning_hpwrangerestriction: The pressure washer's hose restricts you from going any further.
en.tooltip_helperrefillfertilizer: Whether or not the helper automatically refills all fertilizer he distributes. Will increase helper cost.
en.ui_farmdeletehasplayers: You cannot delete a farm which still has active players.
en.tooltip_usemiles: Set the distance measuring units used in game.
en.ui_dlcstorenotconnected_ps4: You need to be signed into PlayStation™Network in order to access this feature.
en.hint_15: You can buy new land for growing crops in the map menu. You can also sell land you own if necessary.
en.ui_waitforpendinggamesession: Connecting to multiplayer game. Waiting for server data...
en.animals_descriptionhorse: A horse's value is determined by its fitness, health and cleanliness. They should be ridden every day to increase their fitness. Horses require straw for clean bedding and water and food to stay healthy. Periodically they need to be brushed and cleaned.
en.function_bigbaghorsefood: Fresh oat to feed your horses with.
en.function_placeablechipper: Any logs you put into this machine are converted into wood chips that are immediately sold to the sawmill.
en.tooltip_fuelusage: Sets how much fuel is consumed by your machinery.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_unfoldtools: For the sprayer, make sure to fill it with herbicide and unfold it. Then, turn it on and drive over the field to spray the weeds.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_sell: Now unload the log at the marked area to sell it by activating the lever.
en.dialog_signinwithusertoacceptinvite: Please sign in with the invited user (%s)
en.function_tipper: Tippers/trailers are used to transport the harvest.
en.helptext_54_part01: You can hire a computer-controlled AI helper for the following tasks: - Cultivating - Sowing - Harvesting - Fertilizing - Mowing - Tedding - Windrowing
en.function_haulmtoppersugarbeet: Before sugar beets can be harvested, the foliage needs to be cut with a haulm topper like this one.
en.shop_messagefailedtosellvehicle: Selling failed! Please try again later.
en.ui_landscaping_notenoughmoney: Not enough money to make this modification
en.ui_signinwithusertoacceptinviteretry: The invited user (%s) needs to be signed in to accept the invite. Do you want to retry?
en.tooltip_useacre: Set the area units used in the game.
en.fieldjob_desc_weeding: Kill the small weeds in field %d using a weeder.
en.function_doghouse: A small hut often built in the shape of a house to shelter a dog.
en.helptext_34_part01: Chaff can be produced from wheat, barley, canola or corn by using a chopper.
en.function_powerharrow: A power harrow prepares fields for the next sowing.
en.ui_activateheadtracking: Do you want to activate head/eye tracking in the game?
en.function_livestocktrailer: This trailer is used to transport animals.
en.animals_sell: Do you really want to sell %d animals (%s) for %s?
en.tutorial_animals_feedingfinished: Good work! Feeding animals keeps their productivity up.  The higher their productivity, the more you animal products you’ll obtain. Such as wool from sheep or milk from cows.  Now, let's give them some water.
en.ui_temporaryban: Activation/product key is blocked temporarily. Please try again later.
en.tutorial_animals_drivetopen: Now that the pigs are in your trailer, drive them to their pen.  The location is marked with a flashing icon on the map. Yellow and black stripes mark the area where you should park your trailer.
en.warning_placeable_error_storeplace: Objects cannot be placed in store areas!
en.hint_29: Your cows always produce milk, but you can improve their productivity by feeding them well. The best food you can give your cow is Total Mixed Ration (TMR), which is produced by mixing hay, straw and silage in a mixer wagon.
en.shop_transportationfee: A transport fee is applied if you do not transport the animals with your own animal trailer!
en.helptext_32_01_part01: You can harvest cotton and sugarcane with a special harvester.
en.warning_toomanyplaceables: There are too many objects of this type. Please sell some first.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_startcultiva: Since you have two tools attached, you can switch between them to operate them individually. The schematic view of the tractor in the top left displays the tool that’s currently active.  Select the cultivator at the back and lower it into the soil, then drive up and down the field as straight as you can.
en.helptext_03_part02: To cultivate, you must lower the cultivator into the ground.
en.fieldjob_desc_useownequipment: Use your own equipment or lease equipment for a reward reduced by %s.
en.warning_placeable_error_restrictedarea: Objects cannot be placed in this restricted area!
en.function_sugarcanetrailer: Sugarcane trailers are able to tip their bins high in order to fill larger trailers directly.
en.statistic_animalrequirementsmain: Animals always need water! They also require a clean feeding area and some require straw. The food mixture consists of:
en.ui_youwanttodeletesavegame: Do you really want to delete this savegame?
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_enterforager: Get in the forage harvester and attach the header and tipper.  The tipper is important because a forage harvester doesn't have internal tanks.
en.warning_placeable_error_collisionwithobj: The object collides with an object!
en.helptext_12_part01: Grass can be: - Fed to your animals - Sold at a selling point - Made into silage (by putting cut grass in a clamp silo or by wrapping a bale)  Hay can be: - Fed to your animals - Sold at a selling point - Made into Total Mixed Ration
en.function_loadingvehicle: This machine can collect sugar beets from the ground and tips them into a trailer.
en.shop_messagefailedtoloadvehicle: The vehicle/tool could not be purchased. Please try again.
en.tooltip_plantwithering: Crops will wither when left on the fields for too long.
en.function_sowingmachineplanter: A sower with a mechanical processing system. Can be used on plowed surfaces.
en.helpicon_text3: Store your potatoes and sugar beets by unloading them here. Two conveyor belts are located behind the hall where you can fill your trailers.
en.hint_20: Grass is cut with a mower, which is usually attached to a tractor. Afterwards, you can use a tedder to turn the cut grass over and dry it to make hay.
en.helpicon_text20: To harvest sugarcane, you will need a sugarcane harvester. It removes the top leaves and cuts the thick sugarcane stalks into small, compact pieces. Just as forage harvesters, sugarcane harvesters do not have their own tank and it is required to accompany them with a tipper.
en.ui_notenoughspacefornewsavegame: There is not enough free space on this storage device to start a new save game. Saving will not be possible.
en.modhub_dependenciestext: The following dependent mods are required and will be downloaded automatically: %s
en.helptext_53_part09: 9) Maximum working speed: Shows the maximum speed the vehicle can work at on even ground.
en.message_greatdemandstarttext: For a brief time, the %s is ready to pay a considerably higher price for %s. The offer lasts for another %d hours.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_sprayerinfo: Sometimes you might be late and the weeds have grown tall, so a weeder can't remove them. In this case, you'll need to use a sprayer and apply plant protection.
en.ui_endwithoutsaving: Do you want to end this game without saving?
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_startfertilizi: If necessary, make sure to unfold the tool. Then, turn it on and drive across the field to spread the fertilizer.
en.function_beltsystemdrivable: This guided conveyor belt facilitates the handling of larger amounts of produce in a shorter time.
en.helptext_05_part02: Unload your harvest into a trailer. It can then be sold at the associated place or stocked for a later use.
en.helptext_27_part01: Fully grown trees can be logged and cut into pieces either by using a chainsaw or a tree harvester. If you cut the tree with a chainsaw, you will need to remove small branches manually. The tree harvester can do it in one go. The resulting logs can be delivered and sold to the sawmill.  The price of wood not only depends on the length but also on the straightness of the delivered pieces. Small, bent pieces will generally sell for less than long straight ones.
en.warning_youdonthaveaccesstothis: You don't have access to this!
en.ui_strictnatwarning: A slow internet connection or a Strict NAT network configuration can degrade your multiplayer experience. Please visit farming-simulator.com/nat for further details.
en.function_multitrailers: You can load the harvested produce on these trailers by simply loading via the hydraulic opening in the side walls.
en.tooltip_radioisactive: Turn the radio on or off.
en.helptext_17_part01: If you want to take a break from harvesting, or if that isn't your main activity, you can also take care of animals: horses, cows, sheep, pigs and chickens.  First you need to buy an animal pen in the shop. Then you can purchase animals from your local animal dealer.
en.ui_modschangedtext: Mods were downloaded successfully. Please restart the game to install them.
en.function_cultivator: A cultivator prepares fields for the next sowing.
en.helptext_58_part01: The weather affects what you can do in the game. While there is hail or rain, you can't harvest your crops and will have to wait until it stops. Keep an eye on the weather forecast icon in the top right corner. When 2 weather icons are displayed, the right one will show you what the weather will be in 6 hours.
en.helptext_05_part01: When the crop is ready to be harvested, use a combine harvester with a suitable header attached.  To harvest, you must: - Unfold the harvester (and the header if required) - Turn it on
en.hint_10: Pigs can eat nearly everything - corn, wheat, barley, canola, sunflowers, soybeans, potatoes and sugarbeet.
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasongraint: Helper %s has a full grain tank!
en.helptext_08_01_part02: When the harvester tank is full, you must unload the large bale of cotton. You need a special trailer to move it to the selling point.
en.hint_26: A seeders and planters needs seeds. You can buy seed bags from the shop.
en.ui_notallmodsavailable_ps4: You do not have all the required DLC.
en.helptext_16_part01: You can optimize the milk production of your cows by feeding them Total Mixed Ration (TMR). TMR is produced by mixing hay, straw and silage together in a mixer wagon.  It's simple, put into the mixer wagon: - 2 hay bales. - 1 straw bale. - Fill the rest with silage.
en.helptext_13_part02: Straw swaths can be packed into bales by using a baler. Alternatively, straw can be picked up by loading wagons. You can sell it directly, use it as bedding for cows or use it as a component for Total Mixed Ration.
en.shop_messagesellfarmlandtext: Would you like to sell this land for %s?
en.shop_messagereturnvehicleinuse: Could not return the vehicle/tool because it's in use.
en.animals_cannotaddtotrailer: The trailer already contains a different animal type!
en.function_tractor: Tractors are required to pull trailers and tools.
en.tooltip_fertilizerstates: Amount of time you need to fertilize your fields for maximum yield.
en.tooltip_helpicons: Show glowing icons in the world with information specific to some locations.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_finishedharv: Excellent! The grain will keep well in your silos. There is a limited capacity you can store in them but you will be able to expand them later in the game.  Once you are ready to sell your harvest, you can take the grain out of your silos and deliver them to one of the various selling stations in the world to make some money!
en.tutorial_animals_entertractor01: Animals are bought from the animal dealer. There’s one on each map.  First, we’re going to buy pigs and transport them to their enclosure.  Enter the tractor, attach the weight and the animal trailer to it.
en.ui_difficulty_easy_description: You already own land and some equipment. In Ravenport, we’ll teach you how to play Farming Simulator.
en.function_siloextension: Increases the storage capacity of your silos. Must be placed near your farm silos.
en.tooltip_volumeradio: Adjust the volume of the music played on the radio.
en.helptext_42_part01: Since the unloading stations are competing with each other, a station may detect a sudden need for a certain commodity. In that case, a temporary demand peak starts.  During demand peaks, the unloading station in question offers a higher price than usual. You will receive a message as soon as peak demand starts and you can look up all current demands in the Prices menu.
en.animals_animalnotsupportedbytrailer: This animal type is not supported by the livestock trailer!
en.helptext_28_part01: You can also chop up logs with a wood chipper to make wood chips and deliver them to the sawmill.
en.tutorial_baling_text_welcomeautostacker: Now you need to pick up your bales and transport them.  Most farmers use a front loader, a bale spike and a bale trailer. But for this lesson, we’ll let you use a bale collector, which simplifies the work tremendously.
en.fieldjob_desc_fertilizing: Fertilize field %d with any type of fertilizer (liquid, solid, slurry or manure).
en.ui_serverwasshutdown: The server has been shut down.
en.warning_dontdriveintowater: Do not drive too deeply into the water!
en.helptext_52_part08: 7) Leased: Shows how many vehicles/tools of this type you are currently leasing.
en.helptext_38_part02: Sheep produce wool that is accumulated into sacks, which can be sold directly for money if they are fed on grass.
en.warning_toomanybales: There are too many bales. Please sell some first.
en.helptext_35_part02: Liquid Fertilizer and Fertilizer can be bought in a large tank or bag from the shop.
en.hint_05: Don't know how to do something? Check the Help section in the pause menu.
en.function_trailedlifter: Trailer with a 3-point hitch for tractors without one.
en.tooltip_helperrefillslurry: Where the helper automatically refills all slurry he distributes. Buying will increase helper cost.
en.function_slurryspreadertool: Liquid manure spreaders can be attached to suitable manure barrels.

en.ui_missingprivilegemultiplayersession_xb: Sorry, you are not allowed to join any sessions.

en.tooltip_istraintabbable: Trains are accessible when switching vehicles.

en.tour_text_part05_visitshop: This is where you can sell your vehicles and tools or buy new equipment. You can either visit the shop in person by activating the shopping symbol in front of it or trigger it anywhere by pressing the button shown below.
en.helptext_24_part02: In order to sell the wool, you have to grab the pallet at the sheep pasture with a pallet fork and transport it to the spinnery.
en.helptext_39_part01: Chickens produce eggs when they're fed. Pallets of eggs appear next to the chicken pen.
en.tour_text_part01_starthelperharvesting: So far so good! Usually, however, you'll have a lot to do, so it makes sense to hire helpers on your farm.  Whenever a job can be executed by a helper, it will be indicated in the top left panel. Hire a helper to take care of the rest of the field.
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_attachtools02: Right then! Tractor. Plow. Weight. Let's go!
en.helptext_62_part06: 5) Buy or sell your animals here.
en.animals_foodmixdescriptionparallel: Feed them a mix of the following foods (for best results, provide all these types):

en.helptext_33_part01: Hay is grass dried with a tedder, it can then be made into bales.
en.function_augerwagon: Auger wagons (also known as chaser bins) are trailers that have their own screw conveyor. You can use them to store your crop and directly unload it into other trailers.
en.hint_01: Using a bale wrapper, you can turn grass bales into silage bales.
en.tour_text_part01_entercombine: This is one of the fields you own from the very start. Its wheat has conveniently grown to a stage where it can be harvested. Time for you to enter this combine harvester and get started!
en.modhub_installdependenciesfailed: The following dependent mods could not be installed: %s
en.function_haystorage: Storage space for hay and straw.
en.tutorial_animals_entertelehandler: Now, get into the telehandler and attach the bale fork to the front.  Pierce the straw bale in front of you, lift it up and drop it into the straw blower.
en.hint_34: To harvest cotton, you must use a self-propelled cotton harvester. When the harvester tank is full, you must unload the large bale of cotton. You need a special trailer to transport it to the selling point.
en.tutorial_animals_feedingwelcome: Each animal eats differently.  Pigs eat almost anything, but they still need to have a balanced diet.  They need: 1) Maize, as their basic food 2) Grain like wheat or barley 3) Protein from canola or soybeans 4) Root crops like potatoes or sugar beet
en.warning_actionnotallowednow: This action cannot be performed at the moment!
en.ui_failedtoconnecttogame: No connection could be established to the multiplayer game.
en.tour_text_part01_turnoncombine: Good! Now unfold the harvester and turn it on so the header starts rotating.
en.animals_foodmixdescriptionserial: Feed them any of the following food types (for best results, provide the most effective food type):
en.animals_buy: Do you really want to buy %d animals (%s) for %s?
en.tutorial_animals_unloadpigs: Open the pigpen menu and unload the pigs from your trailer into their new home.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_wedderinfo: Once the plants have sprouted you can remove weeds by using a weeder in the early growth stages, be careful that they don't grow too tall!
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_finishedtutori: Well done! You learned how to increase the yield with organic and manufactured (synthetic) fertilizer, and learned about catch crops.  In the next lesson you’ll learn how to take good care of your fields.

If you think your user generated content or parts of it are on ModHub without your consent, please contact us.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_silagefinished: Great!  The chaff will ferment and turn into silage in a few days. Then you can use it to make TMR.
en.function_harvestingselfpropelledsugarbee: This self-propelled harvester collects sugar beets in one go.
en.ui_creatinggame: Please wait for the game to be created...
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_finishedspr: Perfect! The weeds have withered and will decompose, allowing your crops to grow faster.
en.function_fillablepalletsugarcane: With this pallet you can refill sowing machines for sugar cane.
en.tour_text_part04_doneselling: Nicely done! Selling your crops is the main way to earn money as a farmer.  Let's drive over to the shop, where the final question mark icon is located. The flashing green ring indicates it on your map once again.
en.helptext_38_part01: Milk is produced by your cows. Their productivity is linked to how well you take care of them.
en.helptext_11_part02: Grass can be collected with a loading wagon or made into grass bales using a baler.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_putsilage: Alright, get back in the telehandler and fill the mixer wagon with silage until it’s full.
en.tutorial_baling_text_entertractor01: Hay is obtained by mowing grass and drying it. It's used to feed your cows or sheep.  Straw is obtained after harvesting wheat or barley. It’s used as bedding for your pigs and cows.  Let's make some square straw bales. Get in the tractor and attach the baler.
en.function_lowloader: This trailer can transport other vehicles.
en.function_tractorfrontloader: This tractor can also attach a front loader.
en.tutorial_baling_text_welcome: In this lesson, you'll learn all about bales.  Bales are compressed bundles of straw or hay that are easy to transport.  Depending on your baler, you can create round or square bales.
en.helpicon_text6: This facility provides heating to the nearby village. Once you start cutting trees and generate wood chips, you can sell them here.
en.tooltip_inputhelpmode: Set which input controls are displayed.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_finishedsowi: Good job! The seeds are planted and now all it takes is time for them to grow into a field of canola, ready to harvest.
en.ui_farmalreadyhasactivemission: Your farm already has an active contract!
en.function_combineforage: Forage harvesters process the indicated fruit types.
en.helptext_21_part01: Food: grass, hay, silage and TMR Product: milk, manure and slurry Reproduction speed: slow  Total Mixed Ration (TMR) is the best food for cows and will maximize their milk production.
en.function_haulmtopperpotato: Before potatoes can be harvested, the foliage needs to be cut with a haulm topper like this one.
en.ui_savegamesavenodevice: No storage device was selected. The game has not been saved.
en.info_balestackertiltingtable: Frame is being lowered. Please wait...
en.hint_02: To earn money, you need to sell what you produce (crops, wood, animals and their products).
en.function_chargingstation: At this electric charging station you can charge your electrical tractors such as the 'Rigitrac SKE 50 ELECTRIC'.
en.tutorial_animals_fillwatertrailer: To fill the water trailer, you have to drive to a water tower. There is one at the location marked on your map.  The water is free so don't hesitate to fill your water tank right up.
en.ui_pressesctocancel: Press ESC to cancel or Backspace to remove current key binding.
en.hint_24: Most of the fields on the map are owned by other farmers controlled by the computer. They take care of their fields but are always in need of assistance and can hire you as a contractor. Check the job board in the Contracts menu.
en.helpicon_text9: At fountains like these you can refill your water tanks.
en.helptext_10_part01: Grass is cut with a mower, which is usually attached to a tractor.
en.ui_kickconfirm: Do you really want to kick %s off the server?
en.function_bigbaglime: Bigbags are used to refill lime spreaders.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_welcome: In today's lesson, you'll learn about arable farming.  To produce crops, there are three mandatory steps: 1) Cultivating 2) Sowing 3) Harvesting  Let's start with cultivating.
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_welcomeplow: After harvesting corn, potatoes, sugar beet and sugarcane, it's a good idea to plow the field.
en.function_harvestingpotatowithoutpreparer: This harvester digs the potatoes out of the ground.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_welcome: In this last lesson, we’re going to talk about forestry.  You’ll learn to: 1) Plant trees 2) Fell trees 3) Transport and sell wood
en.helpicon_text21: During harvest, specialized sugarcane tippers are commonly used as they have a higher tip height, allowing them to tip the sugarcane stalks directly into a truck to guarantee a quick transport. Sugarcane can't be stored in silos, however, it can be tipped anywhere on the ground and stored there. Different stations offer different prices for sugarcane, but the most profitable station would be the sugarcane mill.
en.function_balefork: This fork can be used to handle or transport bales.
en.ui_permissions_lostlandscaping: You have lost permission to modify the terrain.
en.helptext_26_part01: New trees do not just pop up by themselves, they need to be planted with a specialized planting machine.
en.function_animalpenhorse: A place to keep your horses.
en.helptext_56_part01: To get the best out of your workers: - Make them start in the corner of a field. - Make sure there won't be anything in their way. - Don't put too many workers in the same field. - For work related to grass, make sure it takes place in the fields.
en.tutorial_fertilizing_descriptionmain: Learn how to fertilize your fields to get the maximum yield.
en.function_bigbagfertilizer: Bigbags are used to refill your fertilizer spreaders.
en.function_workshop: This workshop allows you to create a spot anywhere on the map where you can customize your machinery without the need of a paid mechanic.
en.helptext_sa_04: To harvest sugarcane, you will need a sugarcane harvester. It removes the top leaves and cuts the thick sugarcane stalks into small, compact pieces. Just as forage harvesters, sugarcane harvesters do not have their own tank and it is required to accompany them with a tipper.
en.tooltip_autosaveinterval: Sets the interval of the autosave function.
en.function_forestrytreelimit: Note: Very large trees cannot be processed
en.tutorial_forestry_text_chainsawcuttrunk: Good! Now align your chainsaw vertically and cut a small log (about 1 meter)  You can also remove the branches using the chainsaw.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_coversilo: Now, remove the harvester from the silo and get down and cover the silo.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_drivetotiptr: The flashing icon on your map shows you where to unload the tipper. Drive over there and empty the grain into your silos.
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_finishedfertil: Very good! You have improved the yield using fertilizer. Next, we will look at using another way to improve yield: catch crops.
en.helptext_62_part02: 1) You can sell your crops here. Check the price menu to see what crops each place wants.
en.tutorial_arablefarmingdone: Good work! And with this you are now prepared to turn your land into a thriving farm!
en.ui_contractorungrantconfirm: Do you really want to remove %s access to your farm?
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_entertractor: Get in the tractor and attach the tools as you did before.
en.ui_activateclientaccounts: First activate separate accounts for other players in the administration menu
en.ui_ensureaxistomapinneutral: Axes to map must have been in the neutral/centered position before this dialog was opened. If this was not the case, press ESC, adjust the axis and start the mapping again.
en.hint_22: Horses need hay, water and oat to be happy.
en.fieldjob_desc_plowing: Plow field %d to loosen the soil and prepare it for the next crops.
en.function_fertilizertank: Liquid fertilizer can be poured into sprayers.
en.shop_messagecannotsellanimal: You cannot sell this animal for the time being.
en.helptext_08_01_part01: For sowing cotton, you need a planter. To fill it, use a seed pallet. To harvest cotton, you must use a self-propelled cotton harvester.
en.ui_difficulty_hard_description: Your starting capital is very limited and you don’t own any land or equipment yet. The economy is tough, prices are low: gameplay elements are on the most realistic setting.
en.helptext_18_part01: You can bring the animals back to the farm yourself in an animal trailer. To do so, make sure that the trailer is parked close to the animal dealer.  For a fee, the animal dealer can deliver the animals directly to your farm.
en.tutorial_animals_cleaningwelcome: Cleanliness around the trough is always recommended.  As your animals eat, they spill their food. It has to be cleaned from time to time or it will impact the animals' productivity.
en.helpicon_text15: You can sell wood logs here. Straight and long pieces without branches earn you more money than short and bent ones.
en.ui_connectionlostkeyinuse: Activation/product key is already in use. Please try again later.
en.ui_pressmousebuttontomap: Press the mouse button you want to use as '%s'.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_tmrwelcome: Your silage is ready now and we can make TMR.  Remember, you have to mix together hay, straw and silage  Now get in the telehandler and attach the bale fork.
en.function_leveler: Levelers are used to move chaff and silage and level the heaps in the silos.
en.tooltip_usefahrenheit: Set the temperature units used in the game.
en.function_harvestingpotato: This harvester digs the potatoes out of the ground. Note that a haulm topper is needed prior to using this machine.
en.hint_21: To make it easier to collect grass, it's best to arrange it into rows using a windrower. Grass can be collected with a loading wagon or turned into bales with a baler.
en.function_wheelloader: Wheel loaders are used to stack and load various goods.
en.tutorial_animals_entertractor04: Enter the telehandler and attach the shovel. Then clean up any spilled food and put it back in the trough.
en.achievement_descmoney10million: Own a bank account with 10 million ingame money
en.ui_savingfailedcontinuewithoutsaving: Saving failed. Do you want to continue without saving?
en.fieldjob_desc_spraying: Kill the weeds in field %d by spraying the field with herbicide.
en.helptext_36_01_part02: Herbicide can be bought in pallets at the shop.
en.function_slurryspreader: Slurry spreaders improve the harvest of your fields.
en.tooltip_volumemaster: Global audio volume. Affects all types of sound equally.
en.helptext_37_part02: Wood chips are produced by processing cut logs in a wood chipper. You can also chop poplars with a forage harvester.
en.hint_06: Change your environment! You can transform a forest into fields if you want to: cut down the trees, remove the stumps and use a plow to create a field.
en.tutorial_fertilizing_text_welcomeradish: Oilseed radish is a catch crop, a fast-growing crop you plant BEFORE the crop you intend to harvest.  Once the radishes have started growing, you need to break and burrow them into the ground with a cultivator. This destroys them but adds a lot of organic matter and nutrients to the soil.
en.warning_placeable_error_deformationfaile: The deformation of the terrain failed!
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasonoutoff: Helper %s has stopped work unexpectedly - out of fuel!
en.helptext_49_part01: From the shop window, you can also enter your garage. You will see all the vehicles you currently own there and you can sell them from there. Their current value depends on their age and usage.  In front of the shop, there's a marked area where you can park vehicles and tools in order to sell them. Anything you sell this way nets you 20% more money of the selling price since you went to the trouble of driving the vehicle or tool all the way to the shop.
en.tour_text_part04_pricesinfo: This unloading station is one of the places on the map where you can sell your harvest. You can check the current prices of all products by opening the menu and going to the prices screen.
en.ui_radiorating: ONLINE STREAMS NOT RATED BY THE PEGI/USK/ESRB
en.warning_donotthreshduringrainorhail: Do not harvest during rain or hail!
en.animals_nohusbandryavailable: You don't have a pen for this animal type!
en.function_combineneedscutter: For a harvester to work, it also needs a suitable header.
en.hint_09: You can increase the yield of your harvest by fertilizing and spraying your fields after seeding.
en.tutorial_baling_text_unfoldbaler: Now, unfold the tool and lower the pick-up. Then, turn it on and drive over the windrow to collect the straw and create your bales.
en.function_animalpenpig: A place to keep your pigs.
en.ui_nofarmscreated: No farms have been created by a server admin, yet.
en.ui_savegamesscanfailed: Failed to load available savegames. Please try again or use a different storage device.
en.function_cutterforage: Headers are attached to forage harvesters.
en.helptext_19_part01: You must take care of your animals: feed them, give them water and change their bedding by using a straw blower.  When animals are happy enough, they reproduce and new animals are added to your animal population.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_unfoldcombin: First, a combine must be unfolded. Then you can turn it on. This way, the cutter is lowered automatically. You can also raise and lower it manually, but remember to keep it low for harvesting.
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_unfoldforager: Make sure to unfold the header and open the pipe. Then turn on the forage harvester and drive across the field to make some chaff.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_text_unfoldweede: Unfold the weeder and lower it to the ground, then drive over the field to remove the weeds.
en.function_manurespreader: Manure spreaders improve the harvest of your fields.
en.helptext_31_part01: In Farming Simulator you can produce a lot of things. To help you keep track of everything here, you will find a quick recap of all the possible productions in the game.
en.ui_choosedifficulty: Please choose the level of difficulty
en.ui_enterhorsename: Enter a new name for this horse:
en.helptext_15_part01: To turn chaff or grass into silage, you need to: 1) Dump it into a bunker silo (at the biogas plant or in one of your own silos). 2) Compact the heap by driving over it. The silo must be at least 10% full. 3) Cover the silo and start the fermenting process. 4) When fermentation has finished, uncover the silo.

en.ui_strictnatwarning_ps4: A slow internet connection or a NAT Type 3 network configuration can degrade your multiplayer experience. Please visit farming-simulator.com/nat for further details.
en.hint_31: You can also crush logs using a wood chipper to sell them as wood chips.
en.fieldjob_rotatechainsawfirst: You have to rotate your chainsaw first
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_welcome: Welcome to the soil care lesson! In this lesson you’ll learn how to take optimal care of your soil to get the best crop yield.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_sowing: Cultivating has loosened the soil, making it well prepared for sowing.  You’ll need a tractor and sowing machine for this task. Make sure to fill the sowing machine with seeds.
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_attachtools01: As usual, go to your tractor, attach the weight and spreader  Then turn it on and drive over your field.
en.tutorial_forestry_text_harvestercuttree: Drive to a tree and turn on the harvester.  Place the claw in front of the tree and cut it down.
en.shop_messageisinuse: The vehicle/tool is currently in use.
en.ui_dlcstorenotconnected_xboxone: You need to be signed into Xbox Live in order to access this feature.
en.warning_inadvancefeedinglimitreached: The maximum capacity of the feeding trough suffices to feed the animals for %d days.
en.info_baleloadertiltingtable: Table is being tilted. Please wait...
en.helptext_14_part01: Chaff is made by chopping up a crop using a forage harvester. You can make chaff from corn, wheat, barley or canola. Make sure to: - Use a header that's suitable for the crop you're chopping - Attach a tipper because forage harvesters don't have internal tanks  Chaff is used to make silage.
en.helptext_32_part01: Wheat, barley, canola, corn, sunflowers, soybeans and oat: when a field is ready you can harvest these grains.
en.tooltip_weedsenabled: Whether or not weeds will grow in your fields.
en.function_highpressurewasher: With this machine you can clean dirty vehicles and tools.
en.tour_text_end: And that's the end of this tour! Look out for more question marks that provide information about specific game elements or visit the tutorials found in the main menu for more in-depth information. Good luck and have fun in the world of farming!
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_welcomeplowi: After you have harvested a field, you'll need to prepare it for the next cycle. You can do that quickly by using a cultivator just as before. But from time to time you should plow your field to make sure that it stays as fertile as possible.
en.function_subsoiler: A subsoiler prepares fields for the next sowing. It can be used instead of a plow.
en.tour_text_part02_enoughcultivating: Well done! That's enough for now. You can finish the field later if you want. Or hire another helper to finish this job.
en.warning_theselectedfruittypeisnotavailab: The selected fruit type is not available on this map!
en.helpicon_text5: Drive to this tank to fill your sprayers or spreaders with fertilizer. During the filling process, money is deducted from your account.  You can find another tank at the garden center.
en.shop_messagenopermissiontosellvehicletex: You currently do not have permission to sell vehicles or tools.
en.function_bigbagpigfood: Perfectly balanced food pellets to feed your pigs.
en.shop_messagecannotsellfarmlandwithplacea: You cannot sell this land while you still own placeable objects on it. You have to sell these objects first.
en.function_balegrab: The grab function of this tool makes it easier to handle or transport bales.
en.tutorial_cropprotection_descriptionmain: Learn how to use a weeder and a sprayer to protect your crops from invasive weeds.
en.function_sowingmachinepowerharrow: Additionally, this machine offers the possibility to seed directly (no previous cultivating or plowing necessary).
en.tutorial_tmrsilage_gotosilo: Ok! Your tipper is full.  Go to the bunker silo marked on your map. There’s already some chaff in it.
en.tooltip_volumegui: Adjusts the volume of menu sounds.
en.ui_norightstoeditmissions: You do not have the access to manage contracts!
en.hint_25: You can use a plow to create new fields on land you own.
en.helptext_sa_03: Sugarcane grows comparably slow, but it does not wither. Harvested sugarcane will grow back after a while and can be harvested again.
en.fieldjob_desc_cultivating: Prepare field %d for the next crop by cultivating it.
en.helptext_46_part01: You can only work on land you own: you can't cut down trees or create new fields on other people's land.  To buy a new parcel, go to the map overview menu and switch to the land screen.
en.tooltip_volumevehicle: Adjust the volume of the vehicle engine and machinery sounds.
en.function_harvestingpotatowithoutpreparer: This harvester extracts the potatoes from the ground and automatically offloads them to form the potatoes into windrows that can be collected by the SE85-55. Please remember that you need a haulm cutter before you can use this machine.
en.warning_couldnottogglechopper: Straw is not available for current fruit type!
en.ui_farmleaveconfirmation: Are you sure you want to leave %s? You will lose all your current permissions.
en.helpicon_text10: If a vehicle's gas tank is empty, you can refuel it at gas stations like this one. There are several of these found along the main roads.
en.fieldjob_desc_baling_hay: Mow the grass in field %d. Then dry it with a tedder and bale it. Take the bales to %s.
en.info_firstfillthetool: You first need to fill the tool
en.shop_messageleasingready: You can pick up your leased vehicle from the store.
en.ui_plow_detach_warning: The plow cannot be detached in this state. Please turn it.
en.ingamenotification_aivehiclereasonunkown: Helper %s has stopped work unexpectedly - unknown reason!
en.helptext_53_part03: 3) Fruit types: Shows with which crops it can be filled or which crops it can process.

en.modhub_uninstallmodtext: Do you really want to uninstall the mod '%s'?
en.fieldjob_desc_filltheunit: Make sure to fill the tool with '%s'.
en.animals_load: Do you really want to load %d animals onto the vehicle?
en.helptext_62_part04: 3) This place has a great demand: they are paying well for a type of crop.
en.tooltip_helperrefillmanure: Where the helper automatically refills all manure he distributes. Buying will increase helper cost.
en.ui_wanttoresetvehicletext: Do you really want to reset this vehicle/tool?
en.function_liquidfertilizertank: Liquid fertilizer tanks are used to refill your sprayers.
en.tutorial_animals_fillwatertrough: Now that the tank is full, return to the pigpen and fill the water trough.
en.helptext_15_part02: Afterwards, you can cover the silo and start the fermenting process. The resulting silage can be picked up with a front loader equipped with a silage fork and dumped into a mixer-wagon or directly into a feeding trough.
en.function_inlinewrapper: Inline wrappers are used to wrap multiple bales together to one tube.
en.ui_repairdialog: Do you really want to repair the vehicle for %s?
en.helpicon_text8: If you have the coin to spare, you can refill your sowing machines at these pallets. The same pallets can also be found at the garden center.
en.helptext_50_part01: Over time, your vehicle will deteriorate. Vehicles in need of repair lose speed or engine power.  Take the vehicle to the shop or to your vehicle workshop to pay for repairs.
en.function_harvestingwindrower: This pulled single-row harvester collects the potatoes previously harvested from the earth.
en.tutorial_animals_strawwelcome: Straw bedding is needed for pigs, cows and horses.  It improves your animals' productivity. Also, the straw will become manure over time.
en.helptext_03_part01: Use a plow or cultivator to aerate the ground before you start to sow your crops.
en.warning_toomanyhusbandries: There are too many animal pens. Please sell some first.
en.helptext_59_part02: Cranes will help you load and unload goods on your train. Note that you can't move animals by train; use the animal trailer in order to do so.
en.shop_messagenopermissiontobuyvehicletext: You currently do not have permission to buy or lease vehicles or tools.
en.tutorial_soilcare_descriptionmain: Learn how to give your fields the best soil for growing crops.
en.helptext_22_part01: As soon as cows are fed, they not only produce milk but slurry as well, which is collected either in a slurry tank or a pit. Note that pigs also produce slurry when they're fed.
en.function_slurrycontainer: A field container is used as an interim storage for slurry. You can fill it with the other slurry tankers.
en.hint_07: Note that you can carry around small pieces of wood by hand if they're not too heavy.
en.modhub_authordisclaimer_ps4: Displayed authors do not correspond to an account for PlayStation™Network.
en.dialog_reinsertdlcmedia: Please reinsert the storage device with the downloadable content, or quit the game.
en.function_beltsystemstart: This belt will take material from the ground and load it onto the next conveyor belt.
en.hint_11: If your animals have water, food and a clean stable, you can soon expect offspring.
en.tooltip_traffic: Allow AI traffic vehicles on roads.
en.tutorial_animals_buyingfinished: The next step is to keep them happy.  Let's feed them.
en.tutorial_baling_text_unloadautostacker: Good job, that's enough for now. Drive to the place marked on your map to sell the bales.  You’ll have to press the unload button twice: - Once to go into unload mode - Once more to finally unload the bales.
en.ui_bankmaxloan: The bank grants you a maximum loan of %s.
en.shop_messagenopermissiongeneral: You currently do not have permission for this action.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_descriptionmain: Learn the basics of the game and how to effectively work your land.
en.tutorial_arablefarming_text_openpipe: The combine grain tank is nearly full. Open the pipe, drive alongside the tipper at the edge of the field, and empty the grain tank into it.
en.ui_notpossibleindemo: This is not possible in the demo version.

en.function_beltsystem: Conveyor belts are an alternative way to load your trailers.
en.tutorial_soilcare_text_welcomelime: After three harvest cycles, your field needs lime.  Lime can be bought in pallets from the shop and is spread over the field with a spreader.

en.tour_text_part02_finished: Let's switch to one of the other tractors. Using the switching feature you can quickly cycle through all of your vehicles.  Do this until you reach the tractor with the next question mark right beside it. Then get out and touch it.
en.tutorial_baling_text_finishedautostackin: Great! You know more about bales now and how to make them.
en.function_ridginghiller: This machine removes weeds and improves the condition of the field by creating furrows. It can be used only during the initial growth stage.
en.function_palletpackergbf: Load potatoes into this fully automated filler to obtain 1750 liter pallets for resale or storage.

en.ui_activategamepads: Do you want to activate gamepads/steering-wheels?

en.tutorial_tmrsilage_descriptionmain: Learn how to optimize your cows' milk production.
